info.title: PayID Platform API
info.description: API documentation for PayID Platform including Authentication, Organizations, API Keys, and KYC flows.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your Bearer token in the format **Bearer <token>**

post.description: Authenticates user with email and password.
Sends a magic link for authentication.

get.description: Checks if user has an active OAuth session. Cookie based.

post.description: Destroys OAuth session and logs user out.
Invites a new member to an organization.

patch.description: Updates member role in an organization.

delete.description: Removes a member from the organization.

post.description: Accepts an invitation to join an organization.
Declines an invitation to join an organization.

get.description: Gets public client information (no auth required - for consent screen).

post.description: Creates a new API key for the organization.

get.description: Gets details for a specific API key.
Search for a user by their PayTag.
